text: delegate codex lanes failed twice mid-build (work-account quota, then an expired restored token) but both surfaced as generic harness_error; a quota/auth-specific failure reason would have saved ~30 minutes of diagnosis
fork left orphaned root src/ and tests/ that a virtual workspace silently never builds or runs
paperclip review produced a tag-level overlap that looked like Shape A but cut and clip have different --where values (Cargo.toml vs paper-core) — two unrelated observations joined by coarse tag
